skill.name: qwen-image-pro
skill.description: Generate images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro via inference.sh CLI. Professional text rendering, fine-grained realism, enhanced semantic adherence. Ideal for posters, banners, and text-heavy designs. Triggers: qwen image pro, qwen-image-pro, qwen 2 pro, alibaba image pro, dashscope pro, professional text rendering
skill.summary: Generate images with Alibaba Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro via inference.sh CLI. Professional text rendering, f...
skill.author: toolshell

security_audit.summary: Security audit completed. Static findings related to external_commands and network are false positives - the skill contains documentation with example CLI commands and legitimate service URLs. The reported 'weak cryptographic algorithm' and 'system reconnaissance' patterns are also false positives from scanner misinterpretation. This is a legitimate image generation skill using the allowed inference.sh CLI tool.

content.value_statement: Create stunning AI-generated images with advanced text rendering and semantic accuracy. Perfect for marketing materials, posters, and designs requiring precise text placement.
actual_capabilities: Generate images from text prompts with Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro model
Create professional text-rendered designs with precise font control
Produce multiple image variations in a single request
Perform image editing with style transfer using reference images
Generate reproducible images using seed values
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI and API authentication
Total pixel count must be between 512x512 and 2048x2048

use_cases.title: Marketing Material Creation
use_cases.description: Generate professional marketing banners and posters with precise text rendering for advertising campaigns

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Create eye-catching social media posts with custom text and graphics
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers and content creators

use_cases.title: Product Visualization
use_cases.description: Generate product mockups and lifestyle imagery for e-commerce

prompt_templates.title: Basic Image Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an image with the following prompt: [YOUR PROMPT DESCRIPTION]

prompt_templates.title: Text-Heavy Poster
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a poster with title "[TITLE]" in [STYLE] font at the top. Below, add subtitle "[SUBTITLE]" in [COLOR] color. Background: [DESCRIPTION]. Style: [STYLE TYPE].
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating promotional posters with specific text

prompt_templates.title: Marketing Banner
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a professional marketing banner. Main text: "[MAIN TEXT]" in [STYLE]. Secondary text: "[SECONDARY TEXT]" below. Background: [DESCRIPTION]. Dimensions: [WIDTH]x[HEIGHT]. Use negative prompt: [NEGATIVE PROMPT]
prompt_templates.scenario: Generating ads with precise dimensions and text

prompt_templates.title: Multiple Variations
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate [NUMBER] variations of: [PROMPT]. Each should have different composition but maintain the core elements.

output_examples.input: Poster with title "Grand Opening" in bold red serif font at top center. Below, the date "March 15, 2024" in smaller black text. Background: elegant gold and white gradient.
output_examples.output: A professionally designed poster with 'Grand Opening' in bold red serif typography at the top, date displayed below in black, set against an elegant gold-to-white gradient background.

output_examples.input: Minimalist logo design for a coffee shop called 'Bean & Brew'
output_examples.output: Four unique minimalist coffee shop logo variations featuring the name 'Bean & Brew' with simple, elegant designs suitable for branding.

output_examples.input: Professional marketing banner for summer sale. Large text 'SUMMER SALE' in white on gradient sunset background. '50% OFF' in yellow below. Clean, modern design.
output_examples.output: A vibrant 1920x1080 marketing banner with 'SUMMER SALE' prominently displayed in white on a gradient sunset background, '50% OFF' in yellow below, with clean modern typography.

best_practices: Use quotes around exact text you want rendered and specify font details like color, style, and size
Set prompt_extend to false for precise control over the generated image
Include negative prompts to avoid common issues like blurry text or low quality
anti_patterns: Avoid overly long prompts that exceed 800 characters
Do not exceed pixel dimensions outside 512x512 to 2048x2048 range
Avoid requesting more than 6 images in a single request

faq.question: What is Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro?
faq.answer: Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro is Alibaba's professional image generation model known for superior text rendering and semantic accuracy.

faq.question: Do I need an API key?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to authenticate with inference.sh CLI using 'infsh login' before using this skill.

faq.question: What image sizes are supported?
faq.answer: Images can range from 512x512 to 2048x2048 pixels, with total pixel count between these values.

faq.question: Can I generate multiple images at once?
faq.answer: Yes, you can generate up to 6 images in a single request using the num_images parameter.

faq.question: How does prompt_extend work?
faq.answer: When enabled (default), the model rewrites your prompt for better results. Set to false for precise control.

faq.question: Can I create reproducible images?
faq.answer: Yes, use the seed parameter with a specific value to generate reproducible images.
